title: polypodium molle
intro: Polypodium molle, also known as the Polypody fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Polypodium and is native to Australia and other parts of the world. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Polypodium molle include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which are often used to treat skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
